meanings.definition: wither, as with a loss of moisture
lean and wrinkled by shrinkage as from age or illness; ; ; ; -W.F.Starkie
examples: a lanky scarecrow of a man with withered face and lantern jaws
he did well despite his withered arm
a wizened little man with frizzy grey hair

meanings.definition: (used especially of vegetation) having lost all moisture
examples: the desert was edged with sere vegetation
shriveled leaves on the unwatered seedlings
